options.label: Deep contrast
options.caption: Switched the button fill to the darkest local tone for a bolder, higher-contrast CTA against the light hero form.
options.aiPrompt: Restyle the 'Button' instance inside Hero Form to use a deep, near-black tone from the local Tone family for a higher-contrast primary CTA, keeping the label text light for readability.

options.label: Soft muted
options.caption: Switched the button fill to the lightest local tone for a quieter, more understated CTA that blends with the form.
options.aiPrompt: Restyle the 'Button' instance inside Hero Form to use a light, muted tone from the local Tone family for a softer primary CTA, keeping the label text dark for contrast.

options.label: Warm accent
options.caption: Introduced a warm accent color outside the current Tone family to make the CTA stand out as a distinct brand accent, at the cost of needing a new local style added later.
options.aiPrompt: Try an Amber-family accent color (warm bronze/gold) for the 'Button' instance inside Hero Form as a distinct CTA accent, and propose it as a new local paint style (e.g. Amber/500) if it works, rather than a one-off hex.

make this button solid blue color and the label of the button should pass the contrast test after that @Ahmed Marwan

job.title: Make hero form button solid blue with contrast-safe label

jobs.commentText: Why don't we try to make this light mode instead of dark mode @Ahmed Marwan

options.label: Warm Tone light
options.caption: Flipped the dark background to a light Tone/300 base with Tone/900 text, keeping contrast readable without introducing a new palette.

ops.match: Wellth isn't just an ordinary place to stay — it's a framework for how you live. Every residence is designed to serve your wellness, your privacy, and your sense of arrival.
Where every stay becomes a Story
From intimate dinners curated to your taste, to early mornings that feel like the world belongs only to you — Wellth is designed for the moments between the milestones.
Square feet of curated living space across Mountain View's finest addresses.
Resident satisfaction score, year over year, across all Wellth properties.
Dedicated lifestyle concierge, available around the clock for every resident.
Share a few details and our concierge will be in touch.

options.aiPrompt: Convert this landing page from dark mode to a light mode look: swap the dark background containers to a light neutral fill and flip all body/heading text and icon colors to a dark tone for contrast, keeping existing button and CTA colors as accents. Preserve auto layout and all existing type styles — only touch fills and text colors.

options.label: Card-based light
options.caption: Kept the hero dark for drama but lightened the Brand Intro and stat sections to Tone/300, creating a light/dark split rather than a full flip.

options.aiPrompt: Keep the hero section on this landing page dark, but lighten the Brand Intro section and the three stat blocks below it to a light background with dark text, so the page alternates between a dark hero and light content sections. Preserve auto layout and existing type styles.

options.label: Full rework via AI
options.caption: Handed the whole light-mode conversion to Figma's AI agent for a first pass, since a true mode flip touches imagery, icon tinting, and contrast beyond what fill/text-style swaps alone can fix.
options.aiPrompt: Redesign this landing page frame in light mode instead of dark mode. Rework background fills, text colors, icon tinting, and image treatments so it reads as a cohesive light theme, keeping the existing layout, hierarchy, and auto layout structure intact. Use only local paint and text styles from the file's style library where possible.

report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: "this one too" gives no action or target beyond a mention — truly ambiguous with no prior instruction in the thread to extend.
report.reply: I want to make sure I did the right thing here — what change are you asking for on this one? There's no prior comment on this thread to point to, so I couldn't tell what "too" refers to.
